name: Unstoppable Domains
description: ICANN-accredited registrar for traditional DNS (.com etc.) and Web3 domains (.crypto, .nft, .wallet). MCP AI Assistant plus REST APIs for domain operations.

agent_endpoints.auth_note: OAuth 2.0 plus API key. Resolution libraries in Java, JavaScript, Swift, and Go. Reseller and affiliate APIs available for white-label use. MCP AI Assistant for agentic domain operations is the agent-callable surface.
